project_metadata.goal: Antigravity Architect Orchestrator (AAO) — transmute minimal user intent into exhaustive, production-grade technical specifications via psychographically-informed multi-agent orchestration.

current_state.last_completed_task: Phase 8 Complete — Full autonomous build. All 11 gaps resolved. Clean production build (exit 0). All 3 routes visually verified.
known_utilities: scratch/src/lib/rft-scorer.ts — RFT lexicon, bi-directional promotion/prevention float score (-1.0 to +1.0)
scratch/src/lib/signal-strength.ts — Shannon Entropy + Entity regex + Sentiment Intensity math (S = 0.40·H + 0.35·E + 0.25·I)
scratch/src/lib/transmutation.ts — Expands 5 answers into TechSpec; ComponentDirective now includes gainBias/fearBias fields; 6 components in deriveAtomicMap
scratch/src/components/intake/RftSlider.tsx — Bi-directional RFT spectrum slider with NLP Auto/Manual Lock
scratch/src/components/intake/IntakeForm.tsx — Multi-step intake form; sessionStorage→dashboard bridge producer (single transmute() call)
scratch/src/components/psych/DissonanceLinter.tsx — Annotated text renderer with animated tooltips
scratch/src/components/dashboard/PsychHeatmap.tsx — Live componentMap-driven Gain/Fear heatmap (no longer hardcoded)
scratch/src/components/dashboard/AgentConsensus.tsx — Terminal-style streaming agent debate log with Replay
scratch/src/components/dashboard/SpecAsCode.tsx — 4-panel spec viewer (Spec/Debug/Atoms/CSS) with Copy JSON, GitHub, Vercel actions
scratch/src/components/dashboard/SpecificationPreview.tsx — Spec preview panel (available for future use)
scratch/src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx — usePathname active route highlighting, Framer Motion layoutId pill, AAA→AAO brand rename
scratch/src/components/Hero.tsx — Fully wired CTAs (Link), animated live signal matrix + streaming agent log preview, stats row, no placeholders
scratch/src/components/AgentDashboard.tsx — Legacy 3-agent status section on home page
scratch/src/components/Terminal.tsx — Animated terminal log section on home page
routes: /  → Home: Hero (animated signal matrix, wired CTAs) + AgentDashboard + Terminal
/intake → Deep Intent Extraction: 5 Golden Questions + SignalMeter + RftSlider + Dissonance gating
/dashboard → Orchestration: PsychHeatmap (live) + AgentConsensus + SpecAsCode (4 panels), Demo/Live mode badge, New Intake reset

data_flow.intake→dashboard: IntakeForm.handleTransmute() → single transmute(data) call → sessionStorage('aao_spec') → /dashboard?status=orchestrating → OrchestratingOverlay (2.2s) → live spec renders

PsychHeatmap wired to live spec.componentMap (was hardcoded)
